hero.eyebrow: Steel Pipe Company · SEZ Angren · Uzbekistan
hero.subtitle: Uzbek-Chinese Joint Venture · ERW Steel Pipe Manufacturing

about.label: About SPC
about.story1: SPC is an Uzbek-Chinese joint venture based in the Angren Free Economic Zone. One goal from day one: manufacture steel pipes to international standards on Uzbekistan's soil.
about.story2: The first ERW line launched in December 2019. Since then — three production lines, annual upgrades, and steadily growing capacity.
about.story3: 200+ specialists, certified production, partnerships with Qarmet, EVRAZ, HUAYE, and MMK. Every product is GOST-certified. Environmental responsibility is built into the process, not added for paperwork.
about.sez: SEZ Angren Free Economic Zone · Akhangaran, Tashkent Region
about.motto: "We don't cut corners. We cut steel."
about.stat_sublabel: 200+ local employees · 3 production lines · ERW straight-seam

process.label: Production Process
process.motto: From raw coil to finished pipe — every millimeter accounted for.
process.s1_subtitle: Coil → flat strip, trimmed and ready
process.s1_copy: Hot-rolled steel coils are inspected, unrolled, and leveled. Strips are joined for continuous operation and precision-trimmed to exact width. The journey begins.
process.s1_tagline: Raw material. No room for error.
process.s2_copy: Calibrated forming rollers gradually bend flat steel from strip to U-shape to closed cylinder. This is where steel becomes pipe.
process.s3_copy: High-frequency current at 2,000–10,000 amps heats edges past 1,000°C. Squeeze rolls forge them together — no filler material, no compromise.
process.s4_copy: Burrs removed inside and out. Heat treatment refines the weld. Sizing rolls calibrate to exact diameter, roundness, and straightness — fractions of a millimeter.
process.s5_copy: Ultrasonic weld inspection. Hydraulic pressure testing at 12 MPa. Dimensional verification. Only then does it earn the GOST stamp and leave our facility.

products.label: Our Products
products.certs_row: Certified: GOST 10704 · GOST 10705 · GOST 3262 · GOST 8639 · GOST 8645 · ISO 559 · EN 10219 · Uzstandard Verified
products.round_desc: ERW straight-seam tubes for construction, infrastructure, water/gas systems, and industrial piping.
products.square_desc: Structural profiles for frameworks, equipment supports, and construction applications. Precise dimensions, consistent wall thickness.
products.profile_desc: Rectangular profiles for construction, bridges, automotive, and industrial applications. Same certified quality, flexible form factor.

quality.label: Standards
quality.f1_tagline: Precision is not a goal — it's the minimum standard.
quality.f1_body: Chinese HF welding equipment paired with SAP ERP delivers full traceability from raw coil to finished pipe. Every seam, every dimension, every shipment — accounted for.
quality.f1_detail: HF Welding · SAP ERP · Full Traceability
quality.f2_body: Continuous production line means fewer joints, more consistency, and tighter tolerances. Modernized every year since first production in 2019 — we don't settle.
quality.f3_body: Every batch certified under GOST 10704, GOST 10705, ISO 559, EN 10219, and Uzstandard. Hydraulic pressure tested at 12 MPa. No exceptions, no shortcuts.
quality.f3_detail: Hydraulic Test 12 MPa · GOST · ISO · EN

partners.label: Trusted Partners
partners.sub: Backed by supply partnerships with the world's leading steel producers and technology companies — raw material quality is locked in before a single coil enters our line.
partners.note: Steel coil — Qarmet, KZ · EVRAZ, RU · MMK, RU · Technology — HUAYE, CN · ERP — SAP, DE · Industry — TTZ, UZ
